scripts.seo:ba4-priority: npm run seo:ba4-validate && node scripts/seo-ba4-priority.mjs --csv docs/templates/seo-ba4-kpi-tracker.csv --top 10
scripts.seo:ba4-weekly-report: npm run seo:ba4-validate && node scripts/seo-ba4-priority.mjs --csv docs/templates/seo-ba4-kpi-tracker.csv --top 10 --out reports/seo-ba4-priority-latest.md --weekly-report-out reports/seo-ba4-weekly-report-latest.md
scripts.seo:ba4-sla-queue: npm run seo:ba4-validate && node scripts/seo-ba4-sla-queue.mjs --csv docs/templates/seo-ba4-kpi-tracker.csv --top 25 --out reports/seo-ba4-sla-queue-latest.md
scripts.verify:release: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test:smoke && npm run test:e2e-smoke && npm run test:regressions && npm run test:map-guard-smoke && npm run test:internal-link-depth && npm run test:entity-consistency && npm run analyze:bundle && node scripts/verify-bundle-budget.mjs && node scripts/verify-seo-gate.mjs && npm run seo:health-report && npm run seo:health-weekly-report
